description: A beautifully designed, weekly-updated HTML/PDF report of the top 20 ASX dividend-paying stocks. Each report includes: yield ranking, ex-dividend dates for the next 30 days, payout ratio health check, sector breakdown, 52-week price performance vs XJO benchmark, and a curated 'Watchlist' section with one-line thesis per stock. Delivered instantly via Stripe-gated download link.
target_audience: Australian retail investors aged 30–65 who follow dividend/income investing strategies. Active on forums like HotCopper, r/AusFinance, and emerging on Bluesky. Willing to pay $9–$19 for a curated, time-saving report they trust over free but ugly data sources.
price_point: $9 one-time per report (impulse buy tier) | $19/month for weekly delivery (4 reports) — launch with one-time first, add subscription in week 2
build_steps: 1. Extend existing ASX screener: add dividend yield, ex-dividend date, payout ratio, and franking credit fields to the data pipeline (2–3 hrs)
2. Define filter criteria: yield >3.5%, market cap >$100M AUD, payout ratio <85%, profitable in last 12 months — output top 20 ranked by yield (1 hr)
3. Design HTML report template: clean Tailwind layout with company logo placeholders, yield badge, ex-div date highlight, sector colour-coding, XJO comparison bar (3–4 hrs)
4. Wire report generation script: screener JSON → Jinja2/template engine → styled HTML → optional wkhtmltopdf PDF export (2 hrs)
5. Create Stripe product ($9 one-time) and generate Checkout link with success_url pointing to report download endpoint (1 hr)
6. Build delivery flow: Stripe webhook → trigger report generation → serve HTML page or signed S3/local file URL (2–3 hrs)
7. Generate a sample/preview report (first 5 stocks visible, rest blurred) as teaser for Bluesky promotional post (1 hr)
8. Post Bluesky launch thread: teaser screenshot, 3 stat hooks (e.g. 'Top ASX yield this week: 9.2% fully franked'), Stripe link in bio (0.5 hr)
9. QA end-to-end: test payment → delivery → report accuracy vs live ASX data (2 hrs)

revenue_potential.notes: Australian investor market is 9M+ retail investors. Even 0.001% capture = 90 paying customers. Dividend-focused content is perennial — no seasonal drop-off. Upsell path: $49/month 'Pro' tier with stock-specific deep-dive add-ons.

rationale: This product wins on five vectors simultaneously: (1) ZERO new infrastructure — the ASX screener data pipeline is already built, only the output layer (template + delivery) is new work; (2) PROVEN demand — dividend investing is the #1 search category for Australian retail investors, with established players charging $99–$399/month proving willingness to pay, creating an under-served gap at $9 impulse pricing; (3) DISTRIBUTION already exists — Bluesky + existing ASX screener audience means day-one reach without paid ads; (4) REGULATORY safe — pure data presentation with no investment recommendations, no AFSL required; (5) HIGHEST conversion mechanics — $9 one-time is below psychological friction threshold, sample teaser with blurred remainder is a proven conversion pattern (used by Statista, similar data products), and Stripe checkout is already live so there is no payment friction to build. Competing products on Gumroad (finance templates, stock trackers) sell at $9–$29 with minimal marketing. The niche research report model at $19/report is explicitly cited as converting well in 2026 indie hacker analysis. This is the single lowest-risk, highest-fit product in our capability stack.
